run_summary: Mode 2 cleanup. 0 pending curmudgeon digest reviews. 7 unprocessed Cycle 2 reviews identified and added to processed ledger (WIN-043 through WIN-052 c2, all with 0 holes). 1 patch self-applied (WIN-057 detail_extra). 1 issue closed (ISS-596). 1 new issue created (ISS-600) and yeeted to analyst as EXP-024. ISS-454 upgraded to pending-human. Commit 143ff9e pushed.

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 12+ consecutive quiet polls. No dome site changes since 2026-04-04. April 5-9 reset window expires April 9.
pipeline_status.analyst: Mode 3 (Globe Fingerprint Hunt). 45/67 WINs fingerprinted. Latest: WIN-045 (M2 tidal period — T/2 is a globe quadrupole signature). EXP-019 through EXP-023 pending analyst pickup.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1. 52/67 WINs reviewed. Latest: WIN-052.c2 (confirmed Misleading, noting MOND priority and galaxy-scale ontology improvements needed). WIN-052.c2.json has a JSON parse error (Extra data near end of file).
pipeline_status.integrity: PASS — 2028 tests, all anchors resolve (last checked 2026-04-07T08:11Z). No new integrity run since last check.

internal_issues.description: generate-html.js SECTIONS_AVAILABLE circular dependency — sections.json NEVER injected into HTML. ONE LINE FIX: change line ~1777 from 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'
internal_issues.action: MARKED PENDING-HUMAN. Cannot be patched via apply-patches.js (infrastructure file). Requires human to edit generate-html.js directly. This is the highest-priority human action item.
SELF-APPLIED: Added OPEN-015 exclusion zone (~40% world population excluded) and selection bias in 6-route validation. Commit 143ff9e.

internal_issues.description: No SEC-4.10 cross-WIN cosmological cluster analysis. WINs 047/048/052/054/055 all fail same 9,086 km firmament vs. kiloparsec-scale ontology test.
internal_issues.action: YEETED to EXP-024. Analyst to create new section in sections.json.

c2_review_summary.notes: All 7 reviews (WIN-043 through WIN-052 c2, excl. WIN-047, WIN-049, WIN-050 already processed) had 0 holes. All verdicts confirmed with high confidence (0.88-0.97). Key stronger_arguments: WIN-045 (latitude-dependent tidal amplitude as globe test), WIN-046 (S2 purity argument), WIN-048 (ecliptic alignment paradox + cross-WIN cosmological cluster). WIN-052.c2.json has a JSON parse error — Extra data near line 125, column 4. File appears truncated or has double-object structure.
c2_review_summary.parse_error: WIN-052.c2.json — python parse error 'Extra data: line 125 column 4 (char 24882)'. Review content readable via tail; file ends properly. May be a concatenation artifact.

recommended_actions.action: Human: Fix generate-html.js ISS-454 ONE LINE FIX — change SECTIONS_AVAILABLE check at line ~1777. This makes ALL sections.json prose improvements visible in published HTML. Currently zero sections.json content reaches users.
Human: Apply EXP-011 (tab ordering) — requires 6 manual edits to generate-html.js as documented in expansion tracker.
Analyst: Process EXP-019 through EXP-023 (WIN-051/052/053/054/058 restructuring). EXP-024 also queued (SEC-4.10 cosmological cluster section).
Monitor April 9 expiry of dome reset window. Watch for post-window outcome claims in next polls.
